data.title: 国际服「Google Play Best Game of 2022 Award」庆祝礼物
data.summary: [Google Play Best Game of 2022 Award of Celebration Gift] Thank you to every Sensei for supporting B
data.body:
[Google Play Best Game of 2022 Award of Celebration Gift]

Thank you to every Sensei for supporting Blue Archive, which has received Awards of Best Story and Popular Games part from the Google Play! To celebrate, we've sent a gift to your in-game Mailbox!💙

#BlueArchive![eYh0u3s5SIDTxDLl7SHIxnxC5s27FLIK.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/eYh0u3s5SIDTxDLl7SHIxnxC5s27FLIK.jpg)
